text.title: Writing Specifications (SDD core) Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example showing inputs → procedure → output for a typical instance of Writing Specifications (SDD core).

example.scenario: Feature 'PDF digest export'. Problem statement names paying users and churn-risk users. FR-1..FR-4 SMART. AC-1..AC-6 Given-When-Then. Out-of-scope: DOCX, scheduled email.
